name: Wizard edge inputs: empty, very long, non-Latin
description: The wizard refuses empty input gracefully, and survives a very long idea and a Chinese-language idea without layout breakage or errors.

planSteps.description: Open the strategy wizard for a new campaign.
Verify that with an empty idea box the 'Think it through' button is disabled or produces a graceful validation message, never a crash.
Paste a very long idea of roughly 150 words describing a fictional product, then click 'Think it through' and wait.
Verify a draft renders with no overlapping or clipped layout and no error banner.
Click 'Start over', then enter this Chinese idea: '我做了一个帮助小团队自动验证 AI 生成代码的测试平台', and click 'Think it through'.
Verify the advisor still produces a structured draft (sections render; non-Latin input does not break the flow).
